tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Fetches the current weather conditions for a location and returns the temperature, humidity, and a short forecast summary as JSON. Pass units to choose the temperature scale; defaults to metric. Raises an error if the location cannot be found.

location.description: City name or 'latitude,longitude' pair to look up, for example 'Seattle' or '47.6,-122.3'.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Converts a monetary amount from one currency to another using current exchange rates and returns the converted amount along with the exchange rate used. For example, convert_currency(amount=100, from_currency="USD", to_currency="EUR") returns 92.5 with rate 0.925. Raises an error if either currency code is not recognized.

amount.description: The amount of money to convert, as a positive number.

from_currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 code of the currency to convert from, for example USD or EUR.

to_currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 code of the currency to convert to, for example JPY or GBP.
